globalStyle: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 crisp side-view pixel art. Binary alpha, continuous dark outer silhouette, top-left lighting, clustered palette shading, no antialiasing, no gradients, no text.
globalNegativePrompt: blur, partial alpha, soft glow, noise dithering, watermark, logo, copied game art, text, frame labels
globalRequirements: Keep transparent corners and a readable one-pixel dark silhouette.
Keep every frame aligned to its declared source rectangle and origin.

briefs.subject: four-frame meadow butterfly ambient mob
briefs.prompt: Friendly butterfly with broad pink-gold wings and a compact readable body, four alternating wing poses.

briefs.subject: four-frame forest moth ambient mob
briefs.prompt: Leaf-green forest moth with warm eye-catching body light and alternating wing poses.

briefs.subject: four-frame cave glowbug ambient mob
briefs.prompt: Tiny blue crystal cave insect with a contained bright abdomen and alternating wing poses.

briefs.subject: four-frame meadow pollen particle sheet
briefs.prompt: Four restrained gold pollen clusters with dark contours and readable drift changes.
requirements: Each frame has enough opaque pixels for native-scale readability.

briefs.subject: four-frame forest leaf drift particle sheet
briefs.prompt: Four clustered leaf fragments turning through a short wind loop.
requirements: Dark contours separate leaves from light and dark backgrounds.

briefs.subject: four-frame cave dust particle sheet
briefs.prompt: Four compact cave-dust clusters with muted earth bodies and sparse crystal highlights.
requirements: Do not resemble ore or an interactable pickup.

briefs.subject: four-frame meadow crown slime elite mob
briefs.prompt: Large readable meadow slime with leaf body, gold eyes, crown-like horns, idle and attack motion.
requirements: Four 32x32 frames: idle, windup, move, attack.

briefs.subject: four-frame forest boar elite mob
briefs.prompt: Existing boar mob language upgraded with leaf armor and a stronger crown silhouette.

briefs.subject: four-frame crystal cave spider elite mob
briefs.prompt: Existing cave spider mob language upgraded with hard crystal carapace spikes.

briefs.subject: meadow biome UI icon
briefs.prompt: Compact framed meadow mark with rolling grass and one wildflower.

briefs.subject: forest biome UI icon
briefs.prompt: Compact framed forest mark with one layered pine silhouette and trunk.

briefs.subject: cave biome UI icon
briefs.prompt: Compact framed cave mark with a dark ceiling and two contained crystal shapes.
